steps.title: Substitute the known value into the equation
steps.content:
We have the equation $x + y = 1440$ where $x$ represents daylight minutes and $y$ represents non-daylight minutes. Since this day has $x = 840$ minutes of daylight, substitute into the equation:

$$840 + y = 1440$$

steps.title: Solve for non-daylight minutes
steps.content:
Subtract 840 from both sides:

$$y = 1440 - 840 = 600$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
